description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular storage box with a domed, hinged lid and reinforced metallic edges. The main body appears to be constructed from wood, giving it a warm brown color and a slightly textured surface. Brass or gold-toned metal bands frame the edges and corners, providing both structural support and decorative appeal. The front features a prominent metallic clasp mechanism, likely for securing the lid, while the back shows two visible hinge attachments. The box has no visible handles or labeling, and its robust build suggests it is designed for secure storage of valuables or tools. Its classic design makes it suitable for placement in garages, workshops, or as a decorative storage piece in urban environments.
description: A wooden storage box with a domed, hinged lid, reinforced by metallic bands and a front clasp. The box is sturdy, decorative, and suitable for secure storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid, metallic clasp, and reinforced metal banding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved lid profile and the metallic hinge attachments at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two metal hinges and the continuous metal banding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curved lid and metallic accents.
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, workshop, decorative indoor area
